titleStmt.title: SII 19.448: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 448. (A.R. No. 196 of 1907.) TIRUVIḌAIMARADŪR, KUMBHAKONAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, MAHĀLIṄGASVĀMI TEMPLE.

summary.p: This gives the extent and boundaries of two pieces of land at Mahēndramaṅgalam purchased (by the temple authorities) with the money endowed by prince Uttamaśīliyār (son of Parāntaka I) for the maintenance of a lamp in the temple of Śrī-Mūlasthānattu-Perumāḷ at Tiruviḍaimarudil. This is an inscription of Parāntaka I. Mention is made of a channel called Nāṭṭuvāykkāl.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakecaripanmaṟki yāṇṭu vatu tiruviṭaimarutil śrī mūlastāṉattup perumāḷukkup piḷḷaiyā ruttamaciliyār viḷakkukku vaitta kāciṭṭuk koṇṭa nilam mahe
ntramaṅkalattu paṉiccaikkuḷattiṉ kiḻai nilam kiḻpāṟkellai kārampicceṭṭut tiruveṇ kāṭa kiramavitta ṉilattukku meṟkun teṉpāṟkellai kurovit tiruvaṭikkiramavitta nilattukku vaṭakkum melpālaṟ
komaruṭaiyār kaḷanilattukku kkiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai ykkālukkut teṟkum Ivvicaitta peruṉāṉkellaiyilu makappaṭṭa nilam �ma�2m meṟpaṭi Ūril nāṭṭu vāykkāliṉ teṉvāy
kkāl nilattukkuk kiḻpāṟkellai kāṭṭuruṭaiyā ṉilat teṉpāṟkellai kurovit tiruvaṭikaḷkiramavittar nilattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai kūṟṟaṅkuṭaiyā ṉilattukku
kkiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai naāṭṭuvāykkālukkut teṟku mi tta paṉṉāṉ kellaiyilu makappaṭṭa nilam �100� 2m Āka nilam � .
Digital edition of SII 19.448 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
